tools.name: create_ticket
tools.description: Create a HaloPSA ticket for the given customer.

tools.name: list_tickets
tools.description: List recent HaloPSA tickets, with optional status and customer filters.

tools.name: search_users
tools.description: Search Microsoft Graph users by email or display name.

tools.name: list_user_licenses
tools.description: Return the M365 license assignments for a given user.

tools.name: rotate_password
tools.description: Rotate the password for a Microsoft Graph user and email the new credentials.

tools.name: create_organization
tools.description: Create a new tenant organization in Bifrost.

tools.name: list_organizations
tools.description: List all organizations the caller has access to.

tools.name: get_role
tools.description: Look up a role by name or ID.
